approach: population = external subjects + self-dogfood ACED skill nodes
run output out of spec tree, gitignored via init-aced
discovery reuses SDD spec-location conventions + eval.md marker

note: 304-M3 design decision (todo 1) settled by owner. (1) Population: external subjects plus self-dogfood ACED skill nodes, delivered one node at a time. (2) Run output at .agents/aced/results/<target>/ out of the spec tree, git-ignored, ignore rule written idempotently by init-aced. (3) Discovery reuses SDD spec-location conventions (ADR-0019 anchors) plus the eval.md marker; no ACED-specific path constant, satisfying issue 356's don't-hard-pin concern.

Encode ADR-0030 multi-capability skill spec-mapping rules (subject granularity, facade node shape, backfill reverse-nav) into SDD governance. Separate SDD CR (changes what SDD specifies). Filed as issue #358.

Reconcile the run-output home naming: the frozen run.feature scenario 'the run is persisted as a timestamped record' and run/README name it 'the suite's results directory', whose plain reading is a spec-tree-colocated results/ — the model M3 abandons for .agents/aced/results/<target>/. Additive scenario self-clears; reconciling the frozen phrase is a Clearance-bound re-open for a future CR. Surfaced by cold spec-judge round 1 (O1).

why: New deterministic node (setup/ignore-run-output), recused from ACED grading (no Fit line, boolean suite, node:test-assertable), subject = the dedicated ensure-results-ignored engine per ADR-0030 Pattern A. CFG drawn from the engine's control flow; 9 scenarios bind to every edge, no post-write failure branch so 'changes nothing it cannot guarantee' holds literally (append-last-wins). Cold aced-spec-validator round 2 ALIGNED: coverage complete, prose/CFG consistent, negation-override is the load-bearing discriminator for the append-LAST design, idempotence and fail-closed non-vacuous. Round 1 reject (uncovered X3 edge + false invariant) fixed at root; correction logged. Additive/new — no Clearance, self-asserted within auto-spec leash.

One ADDITIVE scenario on the already-frozen run node ('run records for a target are kept under the shared aced results directory'). Structural gherkin-cli diff vs origin/main: 1 added / 0 modified / 0 removed, so it self-clears and run stays @frozen (no re-open). Cold aced-spec-validator ALIGNED both rounds: boolean, discriminating (multi-target Given makes 'keyed by target' fail-detectable), and a clean generic/specific specialization of the frozen 'the run is persisted as a timestamped record' scenario (pairwise-consistent, not a contradiction). O1 naming-reconciliation observation recorded as a backlog followup.
